expected_outcome: Competent frontend engineer capable of creating responsive React web applications, managing state, handling API integration, and structuring code using modern React Hooks.

phases.practice_schedule: 1.5 Hours daily building small reusable presentational UI elements.

mini_project.title: Business Directory Cards Grid
mini_project.description: Create a layout grid showing company cards with tags, descriptions, status checks, and filtering parameters based on mock listings.

phases.milestone: Mastered React scaffolding, component rendering, props layout, and modern CSS frameworks setup.

topics.name: State Management (useState)
subtopics: Sharing state across siblings (lifting state up)

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily calling mock backend APIs and validating user input forms.

mini_project.title: Crypto Conversion Tool
mini_project.description: A web application that queries live token price data, enables input validation conversions, and displays interactive list charts.

phases.milestone: Mastered handling component state, tracking side-effects, cleaning resources, and designing controlled forms.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily structuring pages, nesting routes, and consuming shared contexts.

mini_project.title: Portfolio Management App
mini_project.description: A multi-page application with navigation headers, profile edits, task details, and dark/light settings persisted via Context.

phases.milestone: Comfortable building client routers, resolving route variables, and sharing state across pages.

phases.phase_title: Phase 4: Global State Managers & API clients
phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily refactoring component hooks and structuring store layouts.

mini_project.title: E-Commerce Cart System
mini_project.description: Build an online shopping cart using Redux Toolkit to add, modify, calculate sums, and save cart configurations to localStorage.

phases.milestone: Equipped to configure complex state databases with Redux, build reusable hooks, and prepare projects for release.

major_projects.title: Task Manager and Kanban Dashboard
major_projects.description: A complex application featuring drag-drop columns, task filtering tags, project creation overlays, subtask lists, and detailed progress charts.

major_projects.title: Full-Featured Movie Explorer & Dashboard
major_projects.description: Exposes pagination grids, advanced search filters, rating categories, bookmark settings, details trailers, and loads results dynamically from API databases.
